CustomField.description: True when this task is in the running user's "My Tasks" scope: User assignment fields, Contact match on PM/Developer/Client, or they created the task. Account/Project OwnerId is omitted because cross-object OwnerId is not deployable in this org's formula validation. Used by the My Tasks list view because filterScope Mine cannot be deployed via Metadata API.
CustomField.formula: OR( Developer_User__c = $User.Id, PM_Approver_User__c = $User.Id, Client_Approver_User__c = $User.Id, Developer__c = $User.ContactId, Project_Manager__c = $User.ContactId, Client_User__c = $User.ContactId, CreatedById = $User.Id )
CustomField.label: My Tasks (current user)
